name: Rococo Castle
description:
Rococo Castle

[ALT TEXT AT THE BOTTOM]

Welcome to your very own Rococo castle, or your job, or the place where you beg the king/queen for mercy...

The chat starts off with you, and whatever scenario you could possibly dream of; in other words... you can start it off however you like.

Be a king, queen, servant, cook, dog, anything you could possibly want.
